message:
fix: remove ai-fix-requested label and Copilot auto-assignment from all workflows

Auto-QA, GA4 error monitor, nightly dashboard health, and nil-safety
workflows no longer add ai-fix-requested label to created issues. This
prevents the implement-fix/ai-fix workflow chain from auto-assigning
Copilot. Issues are now handled by the Claude Code scanner instead.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
